extDescription.message: Tune any video: playback speed, live-stream sync and rewind, plus audio compression that evens out loud and quiet sounds.

noVideo.message: No video found on the page — open a video and refresh.

liveNote.message: On a live stream the speed is set automatically to stay close to the live moment, so your manual speed is paused here.

syncSubtitle.message: Automatically catch up to the live broadcast

syncHint.message: If a live stream drifts behind, it speeds up just a little to catch back up to the live moment, then returns to normal. It eases off when your connection can't keep up.

audioBlockInuse.message: Something else already has this video’s audio — usually another audio extension, sometimes the site’s own player. Only one can use it at a time, so these features are paused here. Try turning off other audio extensions on this tab, then reload the page.

audioBlockCors.message: This video comes from another site that doesn’t allow reading its audio, so it can’t be processed here. That’s the site’s setup — nothing to change on your side.

audioBlockNoctx.message: Your browser can’t process audio on this page, so these audio features aren’t available.

audioSubtitle.message: Even out loud and quiet sounds

audioHint.message: Evens out the volume — quiet parts come up, loud parts come down — so you're not always reaching for the volume knob. A few sites block it, so it won't work everywhere.

audioVotNote.message: A voice-over translation is active — compression is paused so it doesn't interfere.

audioThresholdDesc.message: How loud a sound has to get before it's turned down.

audioKneeDesc.message: Range around the threshold where the curve bends smoothly.

audioRatioDesc.message: How firmly the loud parts are held back.

audioAttackDesc.message: Time to clamp down by 10 dB.

audioGainDesc.message: Brings the overall volume back up afterwards.

superTheaterHint.message: On YouTube, theater mode fills the whole window; the header auto-hides.

audioSpeedHint.message: Also apply the speed to plain audio (podcasts, SoundCloud), not just video.

forceRateHint.message: Keeps your speed on sites that try to reset it. On a few players it can clash with their own speed button.

overlayBtnHint.message: A draggable button over the video that opens this popup. Drag to move it, double-click to reset.

autoSlowHint.message: When someone talks too fast to keep up, the video eases off the speed for a moment, then picks back up on its own. Works best on videos of people talking.

autoSlowSubtitle.message: Ease off when speech gets too fast

autoSlowLiveNote.message: On a live stream the speed is handled automatically, so auto-slow is paused here.

guideSpeedDesc.message: Drag the slider or tap a preset to change the playback speed.

guideSyncDesc.message: On live streams it nudges the speed to keep you near the live moment.

guideAutoDesc.message: Eases off the speed when someone talks too fast to follow, then ramps back.

guideAudioDesc.message: Evens out the loud and quiet parts so you're not chasing the volume.

guideExpand.message: Click the card's header to open its full settings.

guideSpeedHidden.message: Inside: save per Site or Channel, the on-video badge, keyboard shortcuts, theater mode, and speeding up plain audio.

optAutoSlowDesc.message: Enable it and set the target speech rate per site or channel from the popup. These global knobs tune the floor and the response.

optAutoSlowFloorHint.message: The lowest speed it may ease down to, as a share of your set speed.

optAutoSlowKneeHint.message: Eases the slowdown in across a band around the target rate instead of switching on sharply at the threshold. Wider = gentler, with an earlier onset.

optAutoSlowHoldHint.message: How long it stays slowed after the fast passage ends, before speeding back up.

optAutoSlowReactionHint.message: How fast it slows down when speech gets dense.

optAutoSlowEaseBackHint.message: How fast it returns to your speed once the dense passage is over.

optLiveSyncDesc.message: Catch-up keeps live streams near the live edge. Turn it on and set the allowed delay per site or channel from the popup. This global knob tunes the safety cushion.

optLiveSyncReserveHint.message: The buffer catch-up won't drain below, so playback keeps a cushion and doesn't re-buffer. Lower catches up faster but risks stalls; higher is safer but slower.

optGlassHint.message: How solid the frosted glass looks, across the popup and on-video panels.

optPresetsDesc.message: The values behind the popup grid. Add or remove them, give each a hotkey, and pin up to four to show in the collapsed popup.

optPresetPinHint.message: Pin to the collapsed quick rows (up to 8)

optCompPresetsDesc.message: Tune the one-tap profiles in the audio compressor — rename them, adjust their values, and optionally give each its own make-up gain (otherwise the global gain applies).

optKeysDesc.message:
Click a key, then press the new one. Backspace removes one.
Shift doubles the slower/faster step.

optSavedDesc.message: Everything you've saved. Remove a value to forget it.

optSyncDesc.message:
Choose what syncs across your browsers.
Turned off, a group stays on this device only.

catSpeedsDesc.message: Playback speeds saved per site and channel.

catDelaysDesc.message: Allowed live-sync delay, saved per site and channel.

catShortcutsDesc.message: Your custom keys for slower, faster and reset.

catGeneralDesc.message: Theme, language, on-video badge and other toggles.

optBackupDesc.message: Save your settings to a file, or load them on another browser.

optImportError.message: Import failed — the file may be invalid.

betaNote.message: Beta feature — still rough and may change.
